info.title: kelviq API
info.description: API for interacting with kelviq services, derived from Python SDK documentation.

servers.description: kelviq API Server (General - specific operations might override)

tags.name: Features
tags.description: Catalog features that can be granted as plan entitlements.

tags.name: Plan Entitlements
tags.description: Feature entitlements attached to a plan.

tags.name: Plan Files
tags.description: Files attached to plans, and signed download links.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Generate presigned S3 upload URLs for product/plan images and files.

bearerAuth.description: The Server API Key obtained from the kelviq application. Pass as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Example: 'Authorization: Bearer __YOUR_API_KEY__'

partnerKeyAuth.name: X-Kelviq-Partner-Key
partnerKeyAuth.description: Partner integration secret issued by kelviq. Send the raw secret (prefixed `kvqp_`) in the `X-Kelviq-Partner-Key` header on every partner API request.

BillingAddress.description: The billing address of the customer.

status.description: A status description for the error.

message.description: A human-readable message providing details about the error.

id.description: Server-generated unique UUID for the customer record.

details.description: Any server-added details about the customer (typically read-only).

metadata.description: The metadata associated with the customer.

customerId.description: A unique identifier for the customer that you define.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

metadata.description: A dictionary of custom key-value pairs.

CustomerUpdateRequest.description: Fields for updating an existing customer. Only provided fields will be updated.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

metadata.description: A dictionary of custom key-value pairs. If provided, it typically replaces the existing metadata. Refer to API behavior for merge strategy.

identifier.description: The unique identifier for the feature.

quantity.description: The desired quantity for this feature.

planIdentifier.description: The identifier of the specific plan the customer is checking out with.

successUrl.description: The URL to which the user will be redirected after a successful checkout.

chargePeriod.description: The billing cycle for the subscription.

customerId.description:
The ID of the customer initiating the checkout. If not provided, a new customer may be created depending on server logic.

**Note:** Even if a unique customer ID is provided, if the email address already exists in the system, the subscription will be created for that existing email — not the new customer ID. This is to preserve the uniqueness of the email address.

features.description: A list of features and their desired quantities. SDK documentation notes this as '**Required**', but usage may vary based on examples.

ipAddress.description: The IP Address of the customer, used for location-based pricing.

cancelUrl.description: The URL to which the user will be redirected if the payment is cancelled.

plansEnabled.description: A comma-separated list of plan identifiers to display on the checkout page.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the checkout session (e.g. 'USD'). Required when customAmount is provided with a server API key.

customAmount.description: A custom amount to charge for this checkout session. When provided, taxBehavior is required. When using a server API key, currencyCode is also required.

taxBehavior.description: Specifies how taxes are applied to the custom amount. Required when customAmount is provided. INCLUSIVE means tax is included in the amount; EXCLUSIVE means tax is added on top.

discountsEnabled.description: Whether discount/coupon code entry is shown on the checkout page. Defaults to `true`.

discountCode.description: A discount/coupon code to pre-apply to the checkout session. The code is applied only if it is active, unexpired, and valid for the selected plan; otherwise the request fails with an error.

lockEmail.description: When `true`, the email field on the checkout page is pre-filled and locked so the customer cannot change it. Defaults to `false`.

defaultBillingCountry.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to pre-fill the billing address country on the checkout page.

checkoutUrl.description: The URL that the customer should be redirected to complete the payment.

checkoutSessionId.description: The unique ID for the created checkout session.

resetAt.description: The reset timestamp for the entitlement (e.g., yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss). Not necessarily ISO 8601.

example.detail: Instance ID valid for this license.

planIdentifier.description: The identifier of the specific plan the customer is subscribing to.

successUrl.description: The URL to which the user will be redirected after a successful subscription creation. Optional.

chargePeriod.description: The billing cycle for the subscription. If the plan is free, pass `ONE_TIME` as the chargePeriod.

customerId.description: The ID of the customer creating the subscription.

features.description: A list of features and their desired quantities.

ipAddress.description: The IP Address of the customer, used for location-based pricing.

id.description: The unique identifier of the created subscription.

startDate.description: The start date of the subscription.

endDate.description: The end date of the subscription, if applicable.

billingPeriodStartTime.description: The start time of the current billing period.

billingPeriodEndTime.description: The end time of the current billing period.

recurrence.description: The recurrence interval of the subscription.

status.description: The current status of the subscription.

id.description: The unique identifier of the product.

features.description: List of features included in the subscription.

customerId.description: The customer identifier associated with this subscription.
Unique identifier for the customer associated with this usage.

featureId.description: Unique identifier for the feature for which usage is being reported.

behaviour.description: Dictates how the usage is updated. SET replaces, DELTA increments.

idempotencyKey.description: Server-generated unique idempotency key for this usage report instance.

timestamp.description: Server-generated UTC timestamp (e.g., yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.ffffff) when the report was processed.

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer who performed the event.

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated unique key (UUID recommended) to ensure at-most-once processing.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the event occurred (Format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.ffffff).

properties.description: Custom key-value pairs associated with the event.

planIdentifier.description: The identifier of the new plan.

chargePeriod.description: The new charging period for the subscription.

features.description: List of features and quantities to update for the subscription.

ipAddress.description: The IP Address of the customer, for location-based pricing.

trialEnd.description: Controls the trial period for the updated subscription. Accepts either the literal string `"now"` to end any active trial immediately, or an ISO 8601 datetime string (e.g. `"2025-05-22 08:27:45.430732"`) to set a new trial end date. The datetime must be in the future. If omitted, the existing trial behavior is preserved.

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer for whom the portal session is being created.

token.description: The session token for authenticating the customer portal session.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

customerPortalUrl.description:
The `customerPortalUrl` field contains the customer’s billing portal URL. This URL alone does not authenticate the customer session. To generate a signed portal link, append the `token` value from the same response as a query parameter using the following format:

`${customerPortalUrl}?token=${token}`

Example response:

```json
{
  "token": "cpt-4f7c5dc4-da9f-447b-d447-6266dc35ed6d:23fca530-adeb-4685-b3d5-9928c6d38275",
  "email": "geo@example.com",
  "customerPortalUrl": "https://www.kelviq.com/portal/aphelo/"
}
```

Generated signed portal link:

`https://www.kelviq.com/portal/aphelo/?token=cpt-4f7c5dc4-da9f-447b-d447-6266dc35ed6d:23fca530-adeb-4685-b3d5-9928c6d38275`

The generated URL can be safely shared with the customer to provide direct access to their billing portal session.

cancellationDate.description: Required if cancellationType is 'SPECIFIC_DATE'. Format: yyyy-MM-dd.

organizationId.description: The internal ID of the organization that owns this product.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code resolved from the request.

pricingLocale.description: BCP 47 locale tag used for price formatting (e.g. "en-US").

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the resolved locale (e.g. "USD").

currencyConversionRate.description: Conversion rate from the base currency to the resolved currency.

originalPrice.description: Map of chargePeriod to base price amount (e.g. {"MONTHLY": 19.0, "YEARLY": 190.0}).

PromotionResponse.description: Promotion data resolved for the visitor's detected location.

country.description: Full name of the visitor's detected country.

percentage.description: Discount percentage for the visitor's country. `0` means no active discount.

code.description: Coupon code the visitor can apply at checkout.

message.description: Optional plain-text message. Usually empty — the banner message is in `widgets[].countryMessage`.

widgets.description: UI widgets configured for this promotion. Currently contains one `BANNER` widget.

PromotionWidget.description: Banner widget configuration returned by the promotion API.

highlightFontColor.description: Color for emphasized text such as the discount percentage.

fontSize.description: Font size as a CSS value.

borderRadius.description: Banner border radius as a CSS value.

unStyled.description: When `true`, no default styles are injected. Apply your own CSS from scratch.

addCloseIcon.description: When `true`, a close button is shown on the banner.

countryMessage.description: Banner message template. Supports: `{country}`, `{country_flag}`, `{coupon_code}`, `{discount_percentage}`. HTML tags are allowed.
countryMessage.example: Hello {country_flag} You're from {country}. Use code "{coupon_code}" for {discount_percentage}% off.

PromotionSecurity.description: Security check results for the visitor. `true` means the check flagged the request.

proxy.description: `true` if a proxy server was detected.

relay.description: `true` if Apple Private Relay was detected.

crawler.description: `true` if the request is identified as a bot or crawler.

ProductImage.description: An image asset attached to a product.

image.description: Storage key / URL for the image asset.

ordering.description: Position of the image in the gallery.

thumbnail.description: If `true`, this image is used as the product thumbnail.

enabled.description: If `true`, the image is shown publicly.

ProductImageUpdateRequest.description: Editable fields on a product image. The underlying file cannot be changed; upload a new image instead.

thumbnail.description: If `true`, marks this image as the product thumbnail and unsets the flag on other images.

ProductFile.description: A downloadable file attached to a product.

ProductFileUpdateRequest.description: Editable fields on a product file. The file content cannot be replaced; upload a new file instead.

Product.description: A product in the catalog. Each product can have multiple plans, images and files.

identifier.description: Human-readable, URL-safe slug. Auto-generated from `name` if omitted on create.

taxCode.description: Tax code for the product. Must be one of the supported values.

createdBy.description: Display name of the user who created the product.

ProductRetrieve.description: A product returned via the detail endpoint, including its published plans.

plans.description: Identifiers of all published (latest, non-archived) plans on this product.

ProductCreateRequest.description: Payload to create a new product.

identifier.description: Optional URL-safe slug. Auto-generated from name if not supplied.

taxCode.description: Tax code for the product. Must be one of the supported values.

imageKeys.description: Temporary S3 keys (e.g. `tmp/<uuid>/<filename>`) returned by the upload endpoint. They will be moved into permanent storage and attached as `ProductImage` records.

ProductUpdateRequest.description: Payload for `PATCH /products/{id}/`. Most identifying fields are read-only.

taxCode.description: Tax code for the product. Must be one of the supported values.

imageKeys.description: Additional temporary S3 keys to append to the product's images.

ProductSettings.description: Behavioural and presentation settings attached to a product.

vpn.description: If `true`, VPN traffic is allowed for this product's experience.

ProductSettingsUpdateRequest.description: Partial update to product settings. Any subset of fields may be supplied.

CatalogFeature.description: A feature that can be granted as an entitlement on a plan.

identifier.description: URL-safe slug, auto-generated from name if not provided.

description.example: Number of API calls per billing cycle.

featureType.description: BOOLEAN: on/off flag. CUSTOMIZABLE: numeric limit. METER: usage-based metering.

featureDetails.description: Configuration for the feature. For METER features, expects `featureSubType` (PRE_AGGREGATED_USAGE or RAW_EVENTS), `units`, and optionally `customerUnit` for unit conversion.

meter.description: For RAW_EVENTS meter features: an object with `aggregation` (function, field) and `filters`.

description.example: Number of API calls per billing cycle.

FeatureUpdateRequest.description: Patch payload for a feature. `identifier`, `featureType`, `featureDetails`, `meter` and `details` are read-only after creation.

downloadUrl.description: URL clients can hit to download the file. Will redirect to a forced-download URL.

PlanFileUpdateRequest.description: Update display fields of a plan file. The underlying file cannot be replaced.

LicenseConfig.description: License configuration for a plan (used when issuing license keys).

CatalogPlan.description: A versioned plan attached to a product. Updates create new versions; only the published version is `is_latest=true`.

isLatest.description: True only for the currently published version.

fileKeys.description: Temporary S3 keys (e.g. `tmp/<uuid>/<filename>`) returned by `POST /media/` for files to attach to the plan. Uploaded files are moved into permanent storage and exposed via the plan's `files[]`.

PlanUpdateRequest.description: Patch payload for a plan. If applied to a published (is_latest) plan, a new version is created automatically.

fileKeys.description: Additional temporary S3 keys (from `POST /media/`) to append to the plan's files. Existing files are left untouched.

PlanPublishRequest.description: Publishes the most recent draft of a plan.

updateFeatures.description: If `true`, existing customers are migrated so their feature entitlements match the newly published plan.

updatePricing.description: If `true`, existing customers are migrated to the newly published plan's pricing.

PlanCharge.description: An individual charge inside a feature's pricing definition.

priceData.description: For FLAT/PACKAGE: `{ amount, block_size? }`. For TIERED/VOLUME/STAIRSTEP: `{ currency }`.

upTo.description: Upper bound of the tier. Integer, or the string "inf" for an unbounded final tier.

advanced.description: Optional `{ min_quantity, max_quantity }` (FLAT only, when a feature is attached).

PlanChargeCatalogPrice.description: Pricing for one feature (or the plan itself if `feature` is null).

feature.description: Feature UUID this pricing applies to. Required for non-FLAT models.

usageAlerts.description: Optional usage-alert configuration. `thresholdType` is `PERCENTAGE` (thresholds are 1-100) or `BALANCE` (thresholds are absolute usage values).

PlanPrice.description: A price (per currency) attached to a plan, with its per-feature charge configuration.

PlanPriceBulkRequest.description: Replaces the plan's prices in one atomic call. Creating multiple PAID prices with the same currency is rejected.

PlanEntitlementDetails.description: Per-feature entitlement configuration on a plan. Shape varies by feature_type.

value.description: For BOOLEAN: a boolean. For CUSTOMIZABLE / METER: a number.

usageAlerts.description: Optional usage-alert configuration for this entitlement. `thresholdType` is `PERCENTAGE` (thresholds are 1-100) or `BALANCE` (thresholds are absolute usage values).

PlanFeaturesBulkUpdateRequest.description: Full replacement of all entitlements on the plan. If applied to a published plan, a new version is created.

basePlan.description: Optional plan identifier to set as the base/parent plan.

PlanFeaturePatchRequest.description: Updates only the entitlement `details` for a single feature on the plan.

PlanVersionsResponse.description: Paginated list of every version of a plan (latest first).

PresignedUploadRequest.description: Request a presigned S3 POST policy for uploading a single file (max 5 GB). The returned `fileKey` is a temporary `tmp/<uuid>/<fileName>` path that can be passed to product/plan endpoints via `imageKeys` / `fileKeys`.

fileName.description: Name of the file being uploaded. Used as the suffix of the generated S3 object key.

fileType.description: MIME type of the file. Enforced by the presigned policy on upload.

PresignedUploadResponse.description: S3 presigned POST policy. Upload the file by sending a `multipart/form-data` POST to `url` with every key in `fields` as a form field, plus a final `file` field containing the binary. The returned `fileKey` is what you pass back to kelviq.

url.description: S3 endpoint to POST the upload to.

fields.description: Form fields to include in the `multipart/form-data` POST (policy, signature, content-type, etc.). Send every field exactly as provided.

fileKey.description: Temporary S3 key for the uploaded object. Pass this back to kelviq via `imageKeys` / `fileKeys` on the relevant catalog endpoint.

PartnerOrganizationProvisionRequest.description: Payload to provision a new organization on behalf of a partner. The owner user is created (or an error is returned if the email is already taken), an organization is set up, API keys are issued, and a welcome / set-password email is sent to the user.

externalId.description: Partner-side identifier for this organization. Must be unique within the partner. Used later by `GET /partner/organizations/by-external-id/{externalId}/`.

email.description: Email address of the organization owner. Must not match any existing kelviq user.

businessName.description: Optional business name for the organization. If provided, the organization's name and slug are set from this value (slug is auto-deduplicated).

PartnerOrganization.description: Organization owned by a partner. Returned by all partner organization endpoints.

userId.description: Internal kelviq user ID of the organization owner.

organizationIdentifier.description: Stable UUID identifier for the organization.

clientKey.description: Public client key for the organization's API integration.

serverKey.description: Private server key for the organization. Treat as a secret.

partnerExternalId.description: Partner-side identifier supplied at provisioning time.

count.description: Total number of organizations matching the query.

post.description: Creates a new customer record within kelviq.

patch.description: Performs a partial update on an existing customer using their client-defined `customerId`.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The client-defined unique identifier for the customer.

post.description: Creates a new checkout session for a customer to proceed with a purchase or subscription.

get.description:
Retrieves detailed entitlement information for a customer.
- If `feature_idd` is provided as a query parameter, returns details for that specific feature.
- If `feature_id` is omitted, returns all entitlements for the customer.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

parameters.name: feature_id
parameters.description: Optional. The unique identifier for a specific feature. If provided, filters entitlements to this feature.

200.description: A list of entitlement details for the customer.

specificFeatureExample.summary: Example for get_entitlement for a specific feature

allFeaturesExample.summary: Example for get_all_entitlements for a customer

post.description: Activates a license key for a specific instance.

400.description: Bad Request - Validation failed (e.g., missing licenseKey).

403.description: Forbidden - License expired or activation limit reached.

404.description: Not Found - Invalid license key or customer ID mapping.

example.error: Invalid license key or customer ID.

500.description: Internal Server Error - Processing error during database transaction.

example.error: An error occurred during activation processing.

400.description: Bad Request - Validation error (e.g., missing required fields).

404.description: Not Found - The combination of licenseKey and instanceId does not exist.

example.error: Invalid license key or instance ID.

example.detail: Instance ID valid for this license.

400.description: Bad Request - Request body failed validation.

404.description: Not Found - The license key or instance ID was not found in the database.

value.detail: Instance ID invalid for this license.

post.description: Reports pre-aggregated feature usage from your application to kelviq.
Creates a new subscription for a customer directly, without requiring a checkout session.

400.description: Bad Request - Validation or business logic error.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of subscriptions. You can filter the results by customer.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The client-defined unique identifier for the customer to filter subscriptions.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

post.description:
Updates an existing subscription to a new plan, charge period, and/or features.

> **Warning:** Free plans are created as one-time charges. Upgrading from a free plan is not supported via this endpoint. Use the [Create Checkout Session](/api-reference/checkout/create-a-checkout-session) endpoint instead.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the subscription to be updated. Example UUID from docs: 78058918-9746-4280-9b9b-1bd5115eec6e

post.description: Cancels an active subscription for a customer.

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the subscription to be cancelled. Example UUID from docs: 78058918-9746-4280-9b9b-1bd5115eec6e

get.description: Retrieves the public pricing details for a specific product, including all eligible plans, localized pricing, and the customer's current subscription state. Use this to render a pricing page or paywall scoped to a product.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the product.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: Optional. Your customer's ID. When provided, the response includes the customer's active subscription details and the `isCustomerExists` flag.

parameters.name: plans_enabled
parameters.description: Optional. Comma-separated list of plan identifiers to include in the response. When omitted, all active plans for the product are returned. Example: `plans_enabled=pro,enterprise`

parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.description: Optional. The end customer's IP address, used to determine pricing locale and currency based on their location. Only applied when authenticating with a server API key.

200.description: Successful response with product offering details.

get.description:
Resolves the active promotion for the caller's detected location. Returns the applicable discount percentage, coupon code, banner widget configuration, and security check results.

<Warning>Use your **Client API Key**, not your Server API Key. Find it under **Settings → API keys** in the Kelviq dashboard.</Warning>

parameters.name: promotion_id
parameters.description: The promotion ID from the Kelviq dashboard.

200.description: Promotion data for the visitor's location

widgets.countryMessage: Hello {country_flag} Hey! It looks like you are from {country}. Use code “{coupon_code}” to get {discount_percentage}% off.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key
Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

get.description: Fetches a product by ID along with its currently published plans.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

delete.description: Soft-deletes (archives) the product. Already-archived products return 400.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

get.description: Retrieves the VPN/TOR/proxy and presentation settings for a product. Settings are auto-created if they don't already exist.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

patch.description: Updates one or more product settings fields. Changing `currency` re-enables previously disabled prices in the new currency on the latest plans of that product.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

patch.description: Updates image metadata such as `name`, `ordering`, `thumbnail`, or `enabled`. Setting `thumbnail` to true automatically clears the flag on the product's other images.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

delete.description: Permanently deletes the product image record.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

get.description: Returns a paginated list of features for the organization. Archived features are excluded.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.description: Creates a new feature. For METER features, `featureDetails` must include a `featureSubType` (PRE_AGGREGATED_USAGE or RAW_EVENTS) and `units`. RAW_EVENTS additionally requires a `meter` object with `aggregation` and `filters`.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key
Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

delete.description: Soft-deletes the feature and updates any published pricing tables that referenced it.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

get.description: Returns one row per plan identifier, picking the most recent version for each. Archived plans, or plans on archived products, are excluded.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.description: Creates a new plan against a product. The new plan starts as an unpublished draft (`isLatest=false`) until `POST /plans/{identifier}/publish/` is called.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Specific version number to fetch / update. Defaults to the latest version.

get.description: Fetches a plan by identifier. Pass `?version=N` to fetch a specific version; otherwise the latest version is returned.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

patch.description: Partial update. If the latest version is already published (`isLatest=true`), a new draft version is created automatically; otherwise the existing draft is mutated.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

delete.description: Archives all versions of the plan (sets `isArchived=true`).

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.description: Promotes the most recent draft version of the plan to `isLatest=true`, demotes the previous published version, and syncs the plan to Stripe / internal billing. Optionally migrates existing customers' features or pricing. Fails with 400 if no price exists or required currencies are missing.

400.description: No price exists, missing currency coverage, or already published.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

delete.description: Permanently deletes the latest draft (non-published) version of the plan. The previously published version remains untouched. Returns 400 if the latest version is already published.

400.description: Plan is already published; cannot be discarded.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Optional plan version to scope the query to.

get.description: Returns the prices configured on the plan (one per currency), each with its full per-feature charge configuration.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.description: Atomically replaces the plan's prices with the supplied list. If the plan's latest version is published, a new draft version is created and the new prices are attached to it. Duplicate currencies among PAID prices are rejected.

400.description: Validation error (duplicate currencies, invalid price configuration, etc.).

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Plan version to scope the listing to (GET only).

get.description: Returns the feature entitlements (with per-entitlement `details`) configured on the plan.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.description: Appends one or more feature entitlements to the plan. If the plan's latest version is published, a new draft version is created automatically.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

patch.description: Updates only the `details` (value, reset, hardLimit, rollover, etc.) of one feature entitlement on the plan. A new draft version is created if the latest is published.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

delete.description: Removes the named feature from the plan's entitlements. A new draft version is created if the latest is published.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

patch.description: Updates display metadata on a plan file (name, ordering, enabled). If the plan's latest version is published, a new draft version is created and the file is updated on the new draft.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

delete.description: Deletes the plan file. If the plan's latest version is published, a new draft version is created and the file is removed from the new draft.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

get.description: Public download endpoint for a plan file. Responds with a 302 redirect to a short-lived forced-download URL on the storage backend. Returns 404 if the file does not exist.

302.description: Redirect to the temporary forced-download URL.

post.description:
Returns a presigned S3 POST policy that lets you upload a single file directly to kelviq's storage bucket (max 5 GB, expires in 1 hour). Use the returned `fileKey` as the value of `imageKeys` / `fileKeys` on the catalog product/plan endpoints.

Upload flow:
1. `POST /media/` with `fileName` and `fileType`.
2. Build a `multipart/form-data` request and send every key/value from `fields` as a form field, plus a final `file` field containing the binary.
3. `POST` that form to the returned `url`. A `204 No Content` response means the upload succeeded.
4. Pass `fileKey` to the relevant catalog endpoint (e.g. `POST /catalog/products/` with `imageKeys: [fileKey]`).

400.description: Missing `fileName` or `fileType` in the request body.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

post.description: Creates a new kelviq user + organization on behalf of the partner, issues API keys, and emails the user a link to set their password. Fails with `409` if `email` belongs to an existing kelviq user, or with `400` if `externalId` already exists for this partner.

400.description: Validation error (e.g. duplicate `externalId` for this partner).

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid `X-Kelviq-Partner-Key` header.

409.description: An account with the supplied `email` already exists.

get.description: Returns organizations owned by the authenticated partner. Optionally filter by the partner-side `externalId`.

parameters.name: external_id
parameters.description: If supplied, return only the organization with this partner-side identifier.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid `X-Kelviq-Partner-Key` header.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Organization UUID identifier (the `organizationIdentifier` from the provision response).

get.summary: Get a partner organization by identifier
get.description: Retrieve a single organization owned by the authenticated partner, looked up by its kelviq UUID.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid `X-Kelviq-Partner-Key` header.

404.description: Organization not found for this partner.

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description: Partner-side identifier supplied when the organization was provisioned.

get.summary: Get a partner organization by external ID
get.description: Retrieve a single organization owned by the authenticated partner using the partner-side `externalId`.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid `X-Kelviq-Partner-Key` header.

404.description: Organization not found for this partner.
